name: Blondie
bio: Blondie has a catalog with durable streaming, playlist, publishing, and licensing value that makes it a useful future addition to How Much Music.
notable_for: Blondie is best known here for signature songs that remain recognizable enough to support long-tail catalog demand.
career_highlight: Songs like Heart of Glass and Call Me can anchor the artist page with clear catalog economics and internal links.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming and broad playlist fit support recurring catalog demand.
High recognition creates repeat listening across generations.
Sync, social reuse, and event-driven spikes can lift the annual baseline.
